message:
fix(web): strict media-type matching for Json/Form extractors and per-part body size limit in multipart

extract.rs: Replaces substring-based content-type matching
(ct_lower.contains("application/json")) with proper RFC 7231
media-type parsing. matches_json_content_type now accepts
application/json and application/*+json with a non-empty structured
prefix (e.g. application/vnd.api+json) but rejects misleading types
like application/json-patch+xml. matches_content_type_media_type does
exact type/subtype token comparison. Comprehensive tests cover charset
parameters, structured suffixes, edge cases, and missing content-type
leniency.

multipart.rs: Adds max_part_body_size (default 8 MiB) to
MultipartLimits, enforced during part body accumulation with
PAYLOAD_TOO_LARGE. Prevents a single oversized part from consuming
unbounded memory even when the overall multipart request size is within
limits.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
